sections.heading: view
sections.body: Learn how to define mappings between your data stores and Atlas Data Federation.

sections.heading: Manage Namespace Metadata Catalog for Wildcard Collections
sections.body: Learn about managing namespace metadata catalog entries for wildcard collections.

sections.heading: Private Endpoints
sections.body: Learn how to manage AWS (Amazon Web Services) private endpoints using the [AWS PrivateLink](https://aws.amazon.com/privatelink/) feature for your federated database instance.

sections.heading: Update a Federated Database Instance Region
sections.body:
Learn how to change the AWS (Amazon Web Services) region through which your federated database instance requests are
routed.

sections.heading: limit the amount of data
sections.body:
Learn how to limit the amount of data that Atlas Data Federation processes for your
federated database instances to control costs.

sections.heading: $currentOp
sections.body:
Learn how to determine the status of a running query using the
[$currentOp](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/currentOp)
(aggregation) command.

sections.heading: killOp
sections.body:
Learn how to terminate long-running queries using the
[killOp](manual/reference/command/killOp) command.

sections.heading: Retrieve Data Lake Query History
sections.body:
Learn how to retrieve details about the queries that were run in the past 7 days
using aggregation.

sections.heading: Download Query Logs
sections.body:
Learn about downloading logs of your federated database instance queries from the Atlas CLI,
Atlas UI, and API (Application Programming Interface).
